name: HCM III ACQUISITION CORP.
summary: PART I . Overview We are a blank check company incorporated on April 15, 2025 as a Cayman Islands exempted company and formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses, which we refer to throughout this Report as our initial business combination.
